member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance
member.summary: This class describes all the input data for one IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.name
member.summary: The name of the instance.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.unit
member.summary: The duration of timesteps. This granularity is the one of production/consumption forecasts.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.horizon
member.summary:
The horizon (constant H in the mathematical model) gives the duration of the considered prevision period.
All time-related inputs will be defined as Point within interval [0,horizon*unit[.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.timeMatrices
member.summary: TIMEMATRIX(p,q) is the travelling time from p to q.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.drivers
member.summary: The list of drivers.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.trailers
member.summary: The list of trailers.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.bases
member.summary: The list of bases.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.sources
member.summary: The list of sources.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.customers
member.summary: The list of customers.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.getLatestTime
member.summary: Return the first minute outside of the schedule that is to say : (Horizon+1)*Unit.
member.returns: The last Minute of the shedule

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance.DistMatrices
member.summary: DISTMATRIX(p,q) is the distance between Index p and q .

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Bases
member.summary: A base is a starting and ending point for shifts.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Bases.index
member.summary: The unique index for this point. This index is the index of the Point in the array that would be obtained by concatenation of bases,sources and customers arrays.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers
member.summary: A customer and its specific characteristics.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.index
member.summary: The unique index for this point. This index is the index of the Point in the array that would be obtained by concatenation of bases,sources and customers arrays.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.callIn
member.summary: 1 if and only if unsolicited deliveries are forbidden for this customer that is to say that this customer will only issue orders. consequently the attributes forecast, capacity, initialTankQuantity, safetyLevel and runoutCost are not relevant for these customersByRunoutDate.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.orders
member.summary: A list of orders that is to say pairs with (quantity, time-window). each pair represents a request for a delivery of quantity¸ taking place within the specified time-window. non-satisfaction of orders will be penalized in the objective function.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.setupTime
member.summary: The fix part of load/delivery time as far as the Point (customer or source) is concerned (it is recommended to set this value to an average or median time computed for this customer).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.timewindows
member.summary: The set of availability intervals of Point p, each included in [0,T[. At most two per day.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.allowedTrailers
member.summary: The set of trailers that are allowed to enter this site (for instance because of available equipments).

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.#ctor
member.summary: Default constructor.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.Forecast
member.summary: the forecasted consumption or production of customer or source p during time step h. for sources it is a negative value representing the production rate on each time step (max possible production). For each source it can take only two values: 0 (for maintenance days) or the production rate.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.Capacity
member.summary: tank capacity in mass for customer or source p. It is the maximum quantity of product that can be stored by the customer or source, regardless of the minimum quantity of product that must remain in the container and the part of the container that must remain empty for pressure reasons. for sources it represents storage capacity (finite).

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.MinOperationQuantity
member.summary: The minimum quantity to be delivered for each operation at this customer.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers.SafetyLevel
member.summary: Safety level in mass for Point p. this level is the one that will be considered in the objective function to size inventory shortages.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver
member.summary: Represents a driver with its characteristics. It can also represent a pair of drivers.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver.index
member.summary: The unique index for this resource.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver.minInterSHIFTDURATION
member.summary: The minimum duration between two consecutive shifts assigned to a driver d.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver.maxDrivingDuration
member.summary: The maximum driving duration for this driver, before getting a layover (e.g. 11 hours in the US).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver.timewindows
member.summary: The set of availability intervals of this resource, each included in [0,T[. These intervals are not allowed to overlap.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver.trailer
member.summary: The list of trailers which can be driven by this driver.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver.LayoverDuration
member.summary: The duration of layovers for this driver. A layover is a period of time during which the driver can sleep. It refers to public int layovers (e.g. 10 hours in the us) and not to lunch breaks which are ignored in this model.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver.LayoverCost
member.summary: A fix cost for each layover of this driver.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Sources
member.summary: A source is a production site.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Sources.index
member.summary: The unique index for this point. This index is the index of the Point in the array that would be obtained by concatenation of bases,sources and customers arrays.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Sources.allowedTrailers
member.summary: The set of trailers that are allowed to enter this site (for instance because of available equipments).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Sources.setupTime
member.summary: The fix part of load/delivery time as far as the Point (customer or source) is concerned (it is recommended to set this value to an average or median time computed for this customer).

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers
member.summary: Trailers are gas containers.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers.index
member.summary: The unique index for this resource.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers.Capacity
member.summary: The capacity of this trailer in mass. That is to say the quantity of product that can be loaded in the trailer and delivered to customersByRunoutDate, regardless of the minimum quantity of product that must remain in the container and the part of the container that must remain empty for pressure reasons. it is the usable capacity.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers.InitialQuantity
member.summary: The mass of bulk in this trailer at the beginning of period [0,T[. Must bepublic int to [0, capacity].

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers.DistanceCost
member.summary: The cost per unit of distance.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order
member.summary: Order for a customer.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order.earliestTime
member.summary: The earliest time for the delivery to take place.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order.latestTime
member.summary: The latest time for the delivery to take place.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order.orderQuantityFlexibility
member.summary: The percentage (in base 100) of flexibility allowed to satisfy the order quantity. Must be between 0 and 100.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order.ShallowCopy
member.summary: Shallow copy of this order.
member.returns: A new object with same values for each field (NOT a deep copy).

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order.ToString
member.summary: Printer.
member.returns: String representation of the order.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order.Quantity
member.summary: The quantity to be delivered to this client.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.Order.MinQuantityToSatisfy
member.summary: Minimum quantity to deliver to satisfy this order.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Operation_
member.summary: A loading or delivery operation.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Operation_.point
member.summary: The index of the Point p where operation o takes place.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Operation_.arrival
member.summary: The arrival time of operation o (in [0,T[).

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Operation_.Quantity
member.summary: The quantity to be delivered (negative for sources) in operation o.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output
member.summary: A solution is a set of shifts.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output.getInventory(Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Customers,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance)
member.summary: Returns the output inventory for a site.
member.returns: The site inventory.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output_
member.summary: A solution of is a set of shifts.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift
member.summary: A shift is a list of operations assigned to a vehicle.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.index
member.summary: The index of this shift in the shifts array in the output object.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.driver
member.summary: The driver for this shift (identified by its index).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.trailer
member.summary: The trailer for this shift(identified by its index).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.start
member.summary: The starting time for the this shift (in [0,T[).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.end
member.summary: Ending time for the shift (can differ by a few minutes from arrival(s) because of checking tasks taking place at the base). In [0,T[.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.operations
member.summary: List of operations

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.getCost
member.summary: Return the total cost of this shift (sum of all cost variables).
member.returns: Total cost of this shift.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.StartTrailerQuantity
member.summary: The quantity of bulk in the trailer at the beginning of the this shift.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.EndTrailerQuantity
member.summary: The quantity of bulk in the trailer at the end of the this shift.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.DistanceCosts
member.summary: Distance costs for this shift

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.TimeCosts
member.summary: Time costs for this shift.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift.LayoverCosts
member.summary: Layover costs for this shift.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift_
member.summary: A shift is a list of operations assigned to a vehicle.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift_.index
member.summary: The index of this shift in the shifts array in the output object.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift_.driver
member.summary: The driver for this shift (identified by its index).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift_.trailer
member.summary: The trailer for this shift(identified by its index).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift_.start
member.summary: The starting time for the this shift (in [0,T[).

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_SiteInventory
member.summary: Evolution of the quantity of bulk in the tank of the specified site.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_SiteInventory.site
member.summary: The index of the site.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_SiteInventory.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create an inventory for the given site, over the specified horizon.
member.param: The number of time steps (hence the length of the tankQuantity array to be allocated)

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_SiteInventory.#ctor
member.summary: Empty constructor.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_SiteInventory.TankQuantity
member.summary: Quantity of product in the tank at the end of each period.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.TimeWindow
member.summary: Time interval.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.TimeWindow.start
member.summary: Start time of the interval (included).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.TimeWindow.end
member.summary: End time of the interval (excluded).

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.TimeWindow.#ctor
member.summary: We need a constructor without parameter in order to allow serialization.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.TimeWindow.#ctor(System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: We offer a constructor with natural parameters in order to simplify object creation.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.api.input.TimeWindow.ToString
member.summary: Printer.
member.returns: Time Window reprensation.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation
member.summary: A loading or delivery operation.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation.index
member.summary: Unique identifier of the operation.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation.point
member.summary: The index of the Point p where operation o takes place.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation.arrival
member.summary: The arrival time of operation o (in [0,T[).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation.cumulatedDrivingTime
member.summary: The cumulated driving time between the last layover and operation o..

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation.departure
member.summary: A departure time from point(o) after operation o(in [0,T[).

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation.TrailerQuantity
member.summary: The quantity of bulk in the trailer after performing this operation.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.api.output.Operation.Quantity
member.summary: The quantity to be delivered (negative for sources) in operation o.

member.name: T:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker
member.summary: Checks an Output file to detect non coherent results.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.input
member.summary: Input file related to this output file.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.output
member.summary: Output file to check.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.inputFilename
member.summary: Input File name associated to this output file to check.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.instanceName
member.summary: Input File name associated to this output file to check.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.outputFilename
member.summary: Output File name of an output data to check.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Check all data structures from an input files.
member.param: Input File name associated to this output file to check.
Output File name of an output data to check.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.#ctor(Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance,Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output)
member.summary: Check all data structures from an IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.#ctor(Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance,Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output_)
member.summary: Check all data structures from an IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkAllOutputData
member.summary: Performs a complete check of all data structures.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkLayovers
member.summary: For each shifts with layover of the output file, check all constraints related to layover.
member.returns: True if all shifts are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkLAY03(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32)
member.summary: [ LAY03 : Only one layover per shift is allowed ].
member.returns: True if SHI03 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkShifts
member.summary: For each shifts of the output file, check all constraints.
member.returns: True if all shifts are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkSHI02(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver)
member.summary: [ SHI02 : Arrival at a point requires traveling from the previous point to this point ] Notes that we use inequalities in order to allow waiting time between the end of travel and arrival(o) which represents the actual entry in the site (that can be delayed because of opening hours).
member.returns: True if SHI02 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkSHI03(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32)
member.summary: [ SHI03 : Loading and delivery operations take a constant time ].
member.returns: True if SHI03 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkSHI04(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32)
member.summary: [ SHI04 : delivery operations are performed during opening hours customers ] : For all Operations, the interval [arrival(o),departure(o)] must be fully included in one of the opening time-windows of the site.
member.returns: True if SHI04 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkSHI05(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers)
member.summary: [ SHI05 : Loading and delivery operations require the site to be accessible for the vehicle ] : The drivers must be allowed on this site.
member.returns: True if SHI05 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkSHI06SHI07
member.summary:
[ SHI06 : The trailerQuantity cannot be negative or exceed capacity of the trailer ].
[ SHI07 : The initial quantity of a trailer on a shift is the end quantity on the previous shift of the trailer ].
member.returns: True if SHI06 and SHI07 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkSHI11(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32)
member.summary: [ SHI11 ] The quantity delivered at a customer must be positive and the quantity loaded at a source must be positive too. This implies that the sign of the quantity must be positive for a customer and negative for a source.
member.returns: True if SHI11 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkSHI16(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32)
member.summary: [SHI16| Capacity at the customer's site] For each delivery operation o in a shift s, the delivered quantity must be smaller than the customer tank capacity.
member.returns: True if SHI16 is OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkResources
member.summary: For each resources of the output file, check all constraints.
member.returns: True if all resources are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkDR01(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver,System.Int32)
member.summary: [ DR01 : Shifts separation ] : For each driver d, two consecutive shifts assigned to d must be separated by a delay of minInterSHIFTDURATION(d).
member.param: End of the last shift of this driver.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkDR03(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver)
member.summary: [ DR03 : Respect of maximal driving time ] : For each shift s and operation o (including the final fake operation), the cumulated driving time is either the one of the previous point plus travel time from this point, or the travel time since the last layover if layovers have been taken since last point.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkDR08(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver)
member.summary: [ DR08 : Time windows of the drivers ] : For each shift s, the full [start(s),end(s)] interval must fit in one of the time-windows of the drivers.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkTL01(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers,System.Int32)
member.summary: [ TL01 : Different shifts of the same trailer cannot overlap in time ] : For each trailer, if we consider two shifts s1 and s2 performed by this trailer, either s1 ends before the start of s2 or s2 ends before the start of s1.
member.param: End of lastShift of this trailer.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkTL03(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers)
member.summary: [ TL03 : The trailer attached to a driver in a shift must be compatible ] : For each shift s, the assigned trailer must the trailer that can be drive by the driver.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkServiceQuality
member.summary: Check runout.
member.returns: True if we don't have runout.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkQS01
member.summary: [ QS01 : Orders satisfaction ] : All the orders having a time windows ending before the planning horizon should be satisfied.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.subcheckQS03(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,System.Int32)
member.summary: [ subcheckQS03 : Each operation on a call-in customer should be related to an order, meaning no operations are possible if there is any related order.
member.returns: True if subcheckQS03 are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.checkCosts
member.summary: Check all costs.
member.returns: True if all costs are OK.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.computeCosts(Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance,Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output)
member.summary: Compute all costs for shifts ending before the given time.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.getDriver(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_driver@)
member.summary: Get the driver of a shift and check if everything is OK.
member.returns: True if shiftDriver has been correctly assigned.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.getTrailer(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift,Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance_Trailers@)
member.summary: Get the trailer of a shift and check if everything is OK.
member.returns: True if shiftTrailer has been correctly assigned.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.getPrevTrailerShift(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift)
member.summary: Return the previous shift for this trailer (if any)
member.returns: The previous shift if any, null otherwise.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.getNextTrailerShift(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift)
member.summary: Return the next shift for this trailer (if any)
member.returns: The next shift if any, null otherwise.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.shifts_performed_by_each_trailer(Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Shift_[])
member.summary: Return the ranking matrix of shifts performed by each trailer
member.returns: matrix of shifts performed by each trailer.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.ReadAndRun
member.summary: Perform the checking.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.runOutputChecker(Roadef_Challenge.api.input.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Instance,Roadef_Challenge.api.output.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output_)
member.summary: Check a IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Output object.
member.returns: True if the ouput is valid.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.NbMinutesRunoutsHorizon
member.summary: The number of minutes for planning.

member.name: P:Roadef_Challenge.checker.IRP_Roadef_Challenge_Checker.NbMinutesMissedOrdersHorizon
member.summary: The number of minutes for planning.

member.name: F:Roadef_Challenge.util.Floating.EPSILON
member.summary: The epsilon used for floating-point numbers comparisons.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.util.Floating.Equal(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns true if the doubles a and b are equal.
member.returns: True if the two double are equal, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.util.Floating.Lower(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns true if the double a is lower or equal than the double b (that is, lower than b+epsilon).
member.returns: True if the double a is lower than the double b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.util.Floating.Greater(System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Returns true if the double a is greater or equal than the double b (that is, greater than b-epsilon).
member.returns: True if the double a is greater than the double b, false otherwise.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.util.Floating.StrictlyNegative(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns true if the double a is strictly negative.
member.returns: True if the double a is strictly negative.

member.name: M:Roadef_Challenge.util.Floating.StrictlyPositive(System.Double)
member.summary: Returns true if the double a is strictly positive.
member.returns: True if the double a is strictly positive.
